## Implementation

Verified existing implementation: Comprehensive unit tests for dependency_evaluator.py with 49 test cases achieving 100% code coverage (89/89 statements). Tests cover external ID resolution, missing resolver configs, non-int handles, circular dependencies, blocked issues, state changes, cross-milestone validation, event emission, dependency parsing edge cases, display references, report summaries, and cross-repository dependencies.
